summary: Desktop-only footer and intro cards redesign verification - ALL 7 FEATURES PASSED. Tested: (1) Footer address updated to '1549 Franklin St, Unit A, San Francisco, CA 94109' - no old PO Box address, (2) Footer hours updated to 'Mon–Fri: 8 AM – 6 PM' and 'Sat: 8 AM – 3 PM' - no old 8AM-7PM hours, (3) Footer logo has transparent background (rgba(0,0,0,0)) - no white #fff background, (4) Desktop intro cards are 3-column Impact Cards with stat badges (21+ Cities, $60 Diagnostic, 6mo Warranty), colored accent bars (navy, amber, red gradients), icon circles, and trust footer lines, (5) Mobile (375px) intro cards remain OLD simple layout with icon + title + body - NO stat badges, (6) Mobile footer shows updated address and hours content correctly, (7) Desktop Impact Cards container uses 'hidden lg:grid' pattern and mobile cards use 'lg:hidden' - proper responsive switching verified.
